rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" applied to polished academic prose most directly signals sentence- and paragraph-level editing: tightening wordy constructions, smoothing transitions, eliminating redundancy, and improving register consistency. This is the load-bearing interpretation — failure to improve prose quality invalidates the delegation.
rationale.R1.5: The abstract's paragraph order (IV framing → data → assumptions → empirical result → detector → conclusion) is mostly coherent, but peripheral reordering (e.g., moving the propensity-score caveat closer to the IV assumptions) could fall within a liberal reading of "clean up"; kept at 0.3 as it is not clearly demanded.
